title: Parry It
description:
This mod allows the player to use V1's arsenal of weapons!
!!it's still a WIP so in time it will have more content!!
body:
# **Parry It**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qwGqP9VZX-A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9995AZDgW4M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


So this mod lets you use v1's arsenal from the game ULTAKILL, this project is still a WIP so there are only a couple of weapons at your disposal 

### **Feedbacker**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-   Can parry any entity in the game, as long as it is airborned!
-   Can launch entities in air if you attack them!
-   You can parry dropped items to damage mobs with said items!

### **Knuckleblaster**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-   You can attack blocks to launch yourself opposite of your looking direction!
-   Can uso on entities and mobs to create an explosion that has a cooldown!

### **Marksman Revolver**
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-   You can shoot at Living Entities to damage them!
-   You can launch coins to shoot at and if there are no more coins near the last coin that has been hit, it will target the closest Living Entity!
-   Every coin hit by the blast multiplies it by 2!
-   Both Main and Off Hands have different progress bars for the coins (Max charges in survival is 4!!!)


#   CREDITS!
  This mod would not have been possible without the game ULTRAKILL and its amazing developers and designers Hakita, PITR, Victoria, Francis, BigRock, and Jericho! if you don't know about the game, go check it out because it's such a good game!!


#   Recipes
